name: 6q21_FYN_HACE1_region_SD
description: 6q21 region containing FYN (Src-family kinase paralog of SRC/YES1/LCK/HCK), HACE1, and BACH2. FYN SH2/SH3 domains are >65% identical to other Src-family paralogs on chr20 (SRC), 18q21 (YES1), 1p35 (LCK), 20q11 (HCK), creating cross-chromosome paralog confusion in kinase-domain reads. Short intragenic SDs in BACH2.

architecture.internal_structure: Cross-chromosome paralog tracts (FYN <-> SRC/YES1/LCK/HCK) at >65% protein identity; short intragenic SDs in BACH2 (~5-15 kb); no major local CNV.
